subject: Male android figure with dark hair standing amid yellow-green energy aura, confident pose
description: A male humanoid figure stands in a mid-shot composition, dark hair visible, wearing what appears to be a dark jacket. A yellow-green energy aura radiates around the figure. The expression is confident and composed rather than openly aggressive. The background shows an energy-lit field consistent with the DBS card template. No weapon is visible — the figure's stance is upright and self-assured with hands at rest or lightly positioned.
